use_cases: AI-powered conversational interfaces for user interaction
Real-time streaming chat responses with AI models
Integration with Vercel AI SDK for LLM interactions
Customer support and virtual assistant interfaces
Interactive AI onboarding and help systems
ai_summary: A minimalist AI chat interface component designed for conversational interactions with large language models. Built on Vercel's v0 design system, it provides a clean input area with streaming AI responses and keyboard-friendly navigation. Ideal for integrating AI-powered chatbots, virtual assistants, or LLM-driven user experiences into SaaS applications and developer tools.
